query:
-- Get ABC Furniture ID
SELECT id FROM companies WHERE companyName LIKE '%ABC%' LIMIT 1;

-- Check batch-customer associations for DC-001-GRY
SELECT v.id, v.variantCode, v.variantName, 
       GROUP_CONCAT(vcl.customerId) as customerIds,
       GROUP_CONCAT(c.companyName) as customerNames
FROM product_variants v
INNER JOIN products p ON v.productId = p.id
LEFT JOIN variant_customer_links vcl ON v.id = vcl.variantId
LEFT JOIN companies c ON vcl.customerId = c.id
WHERE p.sku = 'DC-001-GRY'
GROUP BY v.id;
